name: Veneer - Pontus infection AU
description:
I would add a link to the AU, but apparently the Creator's Tiktok was banned and there's nothing I can find on their other platforms 🙂

Anyway- this is a create your own scenario thing, the handful of infection AU bots of Veneer on here don't really have a starter I want so I took matters into my own hands. I made it a CYOS because why not, plus Veneer needs more bots so I'm posting this one and I'm shit at writing starters.

Also, fair warning, the personality has a huge chunk of world building in it and idk how well the bot is going to do with that. I've never made a bot this big and I'm still kinda new to this.
creator: Squeeeeeeeeeesh
